title: Diana Pasulka reveals NASA's mystery rituals around shuttle launches.
summary: Diana Pasulka discusses mysterious religious-like rituals and iconography used during NASA shuttle launches, including Greek goddess imagery and ancient Latin. She also touches on beliefs about contact with angelic beings and parallel religious practices in space programs.

key_claims.claim: A figure referred to as 'Josi' believed he was in contact with angelic beings who are in constant contact with humans if they are able to receive their knowledge
NASA launches conducted by 'Tyler' included iconography such as Greek goddess imagery that the participants did not understand
Latin was sent up into space during these launches, specifically first or second century Roman Empire Latin rather than medieval Catholic Latin
There appears to be a parallel type of religion happening within space launch activities
